ham.subject: Out of Office: Alice Johnson – Returning 8/15
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office on vacation and will return on Monday, August 15th. I will have limited access to email during this period.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact my colleague, Mark Thompson, at mark.thompson@example.com, or call the office line at (555) 123-4567.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Alice Johnson

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Overdue – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued QuickBooks Client,

We regret to inform you that Invoice #QBI-2026-01 has not been paid within the due date. QuickBooks requires immediate payment to avoid interruption of services. Failure to pay within 48 hours may result in account suspension and additional late fees.

Please log in to your QuickBooks account to view and pay the outstanding balance. Click <URL> to proceed.

If you have already paid, please disregard this message and accept our apologies.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Department
